requirements.summary: Redesign all game visuals to blend dark anime, pixel art, and ink-brush styles across all game screens
acceptanceCriteria: Monster sprites in StarterSelection.tsx and Battle.tsx display pixel-art style CSS animations (crisp blocky frames, no anti-aliasing blur) for idle and attack states.
Battle backgrounds and dojo environments use high-contrast anime-style shading with dramatic shadow gradients and speed-line overlays matching the opponent's element.
UI panel borders, section dividers, and chapter headers in GameLore.tsx and StoryCampaign.tsx feature sumi-e brushstroke texture styling (e.g., rough-edge SVG or CSS brush border images).
Monster attack animations in AttackAnimation.tsx include anime-style impact frames: radial burst lines, afterimage trails, or shockwave rings styled with bold ink outlines.
All 6 elemental monster cards in StarterSelection.tsx show pixel-art idle bounce animations using CSS @keyframes with image-rendering: pixelated applied to sprite containers.
The LoginPage.tsx animated background incorporates brushstroke-style particle streaks or ink-wash gradients rather than plain circular particles.
GameHome.tsx navigation cards use dark anime aesthetic card styling: dark background with glowing elemental accent borders, brushstroke section separators, and Bangers font headers.
The overall color palette remains the elemental ninja dark theme (dark backgrounds, neon elemental accents) while incorporating the mixed art style textures and animations.

file_operations.description: Add CSS keyframe animations for pixel-art style monster idle and attack animations using step-timing functions. Add anime-style impact effect keyframes (radial burst lines, afterimage trails, shockwave rings). Add brushstroke particle animation keyframes for login background. Ensure image-rendering: pixelated and crisp-edges utilities are defined globally for pixel-art sprite containers. Add ink-texture text-shadow utility classes for Bangers font headers.

Wire in the generated pixel-art ninja monster sprite sheets (frontend/public/assets/generated/emberfang-sprite.dim_256x64.png, tidalstrike-sprite.dim_256x64.png, stonefist-sprite.dim_256x64.png, galestep-sprite.dim_256x64.png, voltclaw-sprite.dim_256x64.png, voidshade-sprite.dim_256x64.png) as background images on monster card sprite containers. Apply image-rendering: pixelated and pixel-art idle bounce CSS @keyframes to each monster card. Ensure all 6 elemental monster cards display crisp, blocky sprite animations.

Wire in the generated anime-style battle background images (frontend/public/assets/generated/battle-bg-fire.dim_1280x720.png, battle-bg-water.dim_1280x720.png, battle-bg-earth.dim_1280x720.png, battle-bg-storm.dim_1280x720.png, battle-bg-shadow.dim_1280x720.png, battle-bg-wind.dim_1280x720.png) as dynamic multi-layer backgrounds matching the opponent's element. Add CSS-based speed-line overlay elements that activate during attack animations. Ensure battle backgrounds render without horizontal overflow on screens from 320px to 1440px wide. Respect existing reduced-animation media queries from REQ-46.

Add anime-style impact frames to attack animations: radial burst lines, afterimage trails, or shockwave rings styled with bold ink outlines. Use CSS keyframes for these effects. Ensure animations respect the existing mobile reduced-animation media query.

Wire in the generated pixel-art ninja monster sprite sheets (frontend/public/assets/generated/emberfang-sprite.dim_256x64.png, tidalstrike-sprite.dim_256x64.png, stonefist-sprite.dim_256x64.png, galestep-sprite.dim_256x64.png, voltclaw-sprite.dim_256x64.png, voidshade-sprite.dim_256x64.png) for the 6 elemental monsters. Apply image-rendering: pixelated and pixel-art idle CSS @keyframes with step-timing functions. Add element-specific aura glow using elemental colors from tailwind.config.js. Ensure sprites render correctly on mobile (320px to 767px).

Apply image-rendering: pixelated to sprite containers. Add multi-frame pixel-art idle animation using CSS @keyframes with step-timing functions. Add anime-style motion blur or translate offset trails to attack animations using CSS filter or transform. Apply element-specific aura glow using elemental color palette from tailwind.config.js. Ensure animations remain functional on mobile widths from 320px to 767px.

Add brushstroke/ink-style decorative borders and dividers using SVG inline brushstroke shapes or CSS clip-path/border-image. Wire in the generated sumi-e ink brush divider image (frontend/public/assets/generated/brush-divider.dim_800x32.png) for horizontal section separators instead of plain hr elements. Apply Bangers font with ink-texture text-shadow effect to chapter section titles. Ensure brushstroke elements render correctly at all viewport widths from 320px to 1440px.

Add brushstroke-style decorative underline or border to arc headers. Wire in the generated sumi-e ink brush divider image (frontend/public/assets/generated/brush-divider.dim_800x32.png) for section separators. Apply Bangers font with ink-texture text-shadow to arc headers. Ensure brushstroke elements render correctly at all viewport widths from 320px to 1440px.

Add brushstroke border or ink-wash background accent to dojo cards. Wire in the generated sumi-e ink brush divider image (frontend/public/assets/generated/brush-divider.dim_800x32.png) if needed. Ensure all brushstroke elements render correctly at all viewport widths from 320px to 1440px.

Apply dark anime aesthetic card styling to navigation cards: dark background with glowing elemental accent borders. Wire in the generated sumi-e ink brush divider image (frontend/public/assets/generated/brush-divider.dim_800x32.png) for section separators instead of plain elements. Apply Bangers font with ink-texture text-shadow to headers. Ensure the overall color palette remains consistent with the elemental ninja dark theme.

Replace plain circular animated background particles with brushstroke-style particle streaks or ink-wash gradients. Use CSS keyframes for brushstroke particle animations. Ensure the login page maintains the elemental ninja dark theme while incorporating the ink-brush aesthetic.

requirements.summary: Update NinjaBattleSprite and AnimatedPokemon to apply pixel-art rendering and anime-style motion to all 6 elemental ninja monsters
acceptanceCriteria: All monster sprite containers in NinjaBattleSprite.tsx and AnimatedPokemon.tsx have `image-rendering: pixelated` applied.
Idle animations use CSS @keyframes with `animation-timing-function: steps(N)` to produce discrete pixel-art frame movement.
Attack animations include a brief motion-trail or afterimage effect (e.g., duplicate ghost element with reduced opacity).

Each of the 6 elemental monsters has a distinct aura glow color matching its element: red/orange for fire, blue/teal for water, brown/gold for earth, green for wind, yellow for lightning, purple for shadow.
Animations remain functional and non-broken on mobile screen widths from 320px to 767px.

file_operations.description: Wire in the generated pixel-art ninja monster sprite sheets (frontend/public/assets/generated/emberfang-sprite.dim_256x64.png, tidalstrike-sprite.dim_256x64.png, stonefist-sprite.dim_256x64.png, galestep-sprite.dim_256x64.png, voltclaw-sprite.dim_256x64.png, voidshade-sprite.dim_256x64.png) for all 6 elemental monsters. Apply CSS image-rendering: pixelated and crisp-edges to all sprite containers. Add multi-frame pixel-art idle animations using CSS @keyframes with animation-timing-function: steps(N). Add anime-style motion-trail or afterimage effect to attack animations using a duplicate ghost element with reduced opacity or CSS filter. Apply element-specific aura glow colors: fire (red/orange), water (blue/teal), earth (brown/gold), wind (green), lightning (yellow), shadow (purple) using the elemental color palette from tailwind.config.js. Ensure animations remain functional on mobile widths from 320px to 767px and respect existing reduced-animation media queries.

Apply CSS image-rendering: pixelated and crisp-edges to all monster sprite containers. Add multi-frame pixel-art idle animations using CSS @keyframes with animation-timing-function: steps(N). Add anime-style motion-trail or afterimage effect to attack animations using a duplicate ghost element with reduced opacity or CSS transform offset. Apply element-specific aura glow colors for all 6 elemental monsters: fire (red/orange), water (blue/teal), earth (brown/gold), wind (green), lightning (yellow), shadow (purple) using the elemental color palette from tailwind.config.js. Ensure animations remain functional on mobile widths from 320px to 767px and respect existing reduced-animation media queries.

Define CSS @keyframes for multi-frame pixel-art idle animations using animation-timing-function: steps(N) to produce discrete frame movement. Define CSS @keyframes or utilities for anime-style motion-trail/afterimage effects. Define element-specific aura glow color utilities for fire (red/orange), water (blue/teal), earth (brown/gold), wind (green), lightning (yellow), shadow (purple). Add image-rendering: pixelated and crisp-edges utilities if not already present.

requirements.summary: Add brushstroke/ink-style decorative borders and dividers to UI panels across GameLore, StoryCampaign, GymBattles, and GameHome
acceptanceCriteria: GameLore.tsx chapter section titles render with Bangers font and an ink-texture glow/shadow text effect.
StoryCampaign.tsx arc headers include a brushstroke-style decorative underline or border.
GymBattles.tsx dojo cards use a brushstroke border or ink-wash background accent.
GameHome.tsx section separators use an SVG brushstroke horizontal divider line instead of a plain HTML rule.
All brushstroke/ink elements are purely CSS/SVG with no external image dependencies, and render correctly at all viewport widths from 320px to 1440px.

file_operations.description: Wire in the generated sumi-e ink brush divider image (frontend/public/assets/generated/brush-divider.dim_800x32.png) for horizontal section separators between chapters. Apply Bangers font with ink-texture glow/shadow text effect to chapter section titles using CSS text-shadow. Add SVG inline brushstroke shapes or CSS clip-path/border-image for panel borders. Ensure all brushstroke/ink elements render correctly at all viewport widths from 320px to 1440px.

Wire in the generated sumi-e ink brush divider image (frontend/public/assets/generated/brush-divider.dim_800x32.png) for section separators. Add brushstroke-style decorative underline or border to arc headers using SVG inline brushstroke shapes or CSS clip-path. Apply Bangers font with ink-texture text effect to arc headers. Ensure all brushstroke/ink elements render correctly at all viewport widths from 320px to 1440px.

Add brushstroke border or ink-wash background accent to dojo cards using SVG inline brushstroke shapes or CSS clip-path/border-image. Wire in the generated sumi-e ink brush divider image (frontend/public/assets/generated/brush-divider.dim_800x32.png) if section separators are needed. Ensure all brushstroke/ink elements render correctly at all viewport widths from 320px to 1440px.

Wire in the generated sumi-e ink brush divider image (frontend/public/assets/generated/brush-divider.dim_800x32.png) for section separators instead of plain HTML hr elements. Add SVG inline brushstroke shapes for decorative borders. Apply Bangers font with ink-texture text-shadow to headers. Ensure all brushstroke/ink elements render correctly at all viewport widths from 320px to 1440px.

Define CSS utilities for ink-texture glow/shadow text effect to be used with Bangers font. Define SVG inline brushstroke shape utilities or CSS clip-path/border-image utilities for panel borders and dividers. Ensure utilities are responsive and render correctly at all viewport widths from 320px to 1440px.

requirements.summary: Update battle screen backgrounds in Battle.tsx to use anime-style illustrated environment art with multi-layer parallax and atmospheric effects
acceptanceCriteria: Each of the 6 element types renders a visually distinct multi-layer battle background in Battle.tsx.
Fire dojo background includes animated ember/spark particle elements using CSS keyframes.
Water temple background includes animated mist or ripple overlay elements.
Bamboo forest background includes animated falling-leaf particles.
Storm peak background includes a periodic CSS lightning-flash animation.
Shadow realm background includes floating dark orb or shadow-wisp particle elements.
Earth canyon background includes dust-mote particle elements.
Speed-line overlay elements appear (briefly) when an attack animation fires.
Backgrounds render without causing horizontal overflow or breaking the battle layout on screens from 320px to 1440px wide.

file_operations.description: Wire in the generated anime-style battle background images for all 6 dojo environments dynamically based on opponent's element: fire dojo (frontend/public/assets/generated/battle-bg-fire.dim_1280x720.png), water temple (frontend/public/assets/generated/battle-bg-water.dim_1280x720.png), bamboo forest/earth (frontend/public/assets/generated/battle-bg-earth.dim_1280x720.png), storm peak (frontend/public/assets/generated/battle-bg-storm.dim_1280x720.png), shadow realm (frontend/public/assets/generated/battle-bg-shadow.dim_1280x720.png), earth canyon/wind (frontend/public/assets/generated/battle-bg-wind.dim_1280x720.png). Implement multi-layer parallax-style background with at least 2 depth layers (foreground silhouette + background sky/terrain) using CSS layered pseudo-elements. Add element-specific atmospheric particle animations: ember/spark for fire, mist/ripple for water, falling-leaf for bamboo/earth, lightning-flash for storm, shadow-wisp for shadow realm, dust-mote for earth canyon. Add speed-line overlay elements that activate briefly during attack animations. Ensure backgrounds render without horizontal overflow and remain functional on screens from 320px to 1440px wide, respecting existing reduced-animation media queries.

Define CSS @keyframes for anime-style atmospheric particle animations: ember/spark particles (fire), mist/ripple overlay (water), falling-leaf particles (bamboo/earth), lightning-flash animation (storm), shadow-wisp particles (shadow realm), dust-mote particles (earth canyon). Define CSS @keyframes for speed-line overlay elements that activate during attack animations. Ensure animations respect existing reduced-animation media queries and render correctly at all viewport widths from 320px to 1440px.
